SavedFile.title: SavedFile
SavedFile.description: Represents a virtual file or document stored by the user, mirrored to Firestore

name.description: Name of the file including extension

mimeType.description: The mime type of the file, e.g. text/plain, text/markdown

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the file

userId.description: User id of the owner of this file

ChatHistory.title: ChatHistory
ChatHistory.description: Represents a user chat thread stored in firestore

id.description: Unique identifier of the chat thread

messages.description: Array of messages containing role, parts, and timestamp

RegistrationRequest.title: RegistrationRequest
RegistrationRequest.description: Represents an account registration request pending admin approval

users/{userId}/files/{fileId}.description: The set of virtual files created and stored by the user

users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}.description: User's individual chat logs and thread history with Gemini AI
